scripts.audit:inventory: echo '=== AUDIT: File Inventory ===' && git ls-files | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | wc -l && echo 'TypeScript/JS files tracked'
scripts.audit:simulation: echo '=== AUDIT: Simulation Check (productive code) ===' && ! grep -RnE 'Math\.random[[:space:]]*\(|\bfakeData\b|\bmockData\b|\bdummyData\b|\bdemoData\b|\bsimulate[A-Z]|\bsyntheticSignal\b' src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --exclude-dir=__tests__ 2>/dev/null || (echo 'FOUND simulation patterns in productive code' && exit 1)
scripts.audit:hardcoded: echo '=== AUDIT: Hardcoded Biometric Defaults ===' && ! grep -RnE 'spo2[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*9[5-9]|bpm[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*7[0-9]|systolic[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*1[12][0-9]|diastolic[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*[78][0-9]' src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --exclude-dir=__tests__ 2>/dev/null || (echo 'FOUND hardcoded biometric defaults' && exit 1)
scripts.audit:duplicates: echo '=== AUDIT: Duplicate Processors ===' && (find src/modules -name 'HeartBeatProcessor*.ts' | wc -l | xargs -I {} sh -c 'test {} -le 1 && echo "✓ HeartBeatProcessor unique" || (echo "✗ duplicates found" && exit 1)') && (find src/modules -name 'PPGSignalProcessor*.ts' | wc -l | xargs -I {} sh -c 'test {} -le 1 && echo "✓ PPGSignalProcessor unique" || (echo "✗ duplicates found" && exit 1)')
scripts.audit:dead-code: echo '=== AUDIT: Dead-File Imports ===' && (grep -RnE "from '[.@/][^']*HeartBeatProcessor'" src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' && (echo '✗ legacy HeartBeatProcessor still referenced' && exit 1)) || echo '✓ no dead HeartBeatProcessor refs'
scripts.audit:rgb-derived: echo '=== AUDIT: RGB-derived SpO2 ===' && grep -q 'redAC' src/modules/vital-signs/SpO2Processor.ts && grep -q 'greenAC' src/modules/vital-signs/SpO2Processor.ts && echo '✓ SpO2 uses real RGB AC/DC' || (echo '✗ SpO2 not RGB-derived' && exit 1)
scripts.audit:reachability: echo '=== AUDIT: Entry Points ===' && test -f src/main.tsx && echo '✓ main.tsx exists' || echo '✗ main.tsx missing'
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:inventory && npm run audit:simulation && npm run audit:hardcoded && npm run audit:duplicates && npm run audit:dead-code && npm run audit:rgb-derived && npm run audit:reachability && npm run build
scripts.security:check-env: echo '=== SECURITY: Environment Check ===' && (test -f .env && echo '⚠ .env exists - ensure not committed' || echo '✓ .env not present') && test -f .env.example && echo '✓ .env.example exists' || echo '⚠ .env.example missing'
